# Known Conformance Issues

This document is generated from `tools/conformance/known-issues.ron`. Edit the RON catalog, not this file.

## DECODE

### `jbig2dec` / `TT8`

- Category: KI (known issue)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "color segments (NYI)"`
- Upstream: jbig2dec: AMD3 colour palette segments are unimplemented; the decoder prints this message from its own page-segment handler
- Evidence: vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_page.c:124 prints `page segment indicates use of color segments (NYI)`
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `system-binary` / `TT8`

- Category: KI (known issue)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "color segments (NYI)"`
- Upstream: Same as jbig2dec row; the system jbig2dec is expected to be the same Artifex decoder family
- Evidence: Observed system-binary row emits the same `color segments (NYI)` message as vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_page.c:124
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `jbig2dec` / `TT5`

- Category: WTF (upstream WONTFIX)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "refinement references unknown symbol"`
- Upstream: jbig2dec: refinement-aggregate symbol dictionary path drops newly-decoded symbols when REFAGGNINST > 1, so any later refinement reference resolves to symbol id 0 and the decoder bails. Artifex closed the upstream report as RESOLVED WONTFIX in 2017 and the defect has remained in shipping releases since.
- Evidence: Upstream WONTFIX: https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695737 (`jbig2_decode_symbol_dict: newly decoded symbols missing in dictionary used for REFAGGNINST > 1 decoding`). Reproduces at vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_symbol_dict.c (jbig2_decode_symbol_dict / jbig2_decode_refinement_region) where the manifested error message originates.
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `system-binary` / `TT5`

- Category: WTF (upstream WONTFIX)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "refinement references unknown symbol"`
- Upstream: Same as the vendored jbig2dec row; the system jbig2dec is the same Artifex decoder family and inherits the upstream WONTFIX.
- Evidence: Upstream WONTFIX: https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695737. Observed system-binary row emits the same `refinement references unknown symbol` message as vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_symbol_dict.c.
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `jbig2dec` / `TT6`

- Category: WTF (upstream WONTFIX)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "OOB obtained when decoding symbol instance refinement data"`
- Upstream: jbig2dec: text region with symbol refinement on TT6 trips the same refinement-aggregate symbol-dictionary defect as TT5 (REFAGGNINST > 1 path drops decoded symbols), exposed here through the text-region path. The jbig2dec-side of the bug bundle is closed RESOLVED WONTFIX upstream.
- Evidence: Upstream WONTFIX: https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695737 and the related symbol/text-region tickets https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695736 / https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695741. Diagnostic originates at vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_text.c (jbig2_decode_text_region) which calls into the broken refinement path in vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_refinement.c.
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `system-binary` / `TT6`

- Category: WTF (upstream WONTFIX)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "OOB obtained when decoding symbol instance refinement data"`
- Upstream: Same as the vendored jbig2dec row; the system jbig2dec is the same Artifex decoder family and inherits the upstream WONTFIX.
- Evidence: Upstream WONTFIX: https://bugs.ghostscript.com/show_bug.cgi?id=695737. Observed system-binary row emits the same `OOB obtained when decoding symbol instance refinement data` message as vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_text.c.
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

## ENCODE

### `system-binary:-s -r -d -t 0.85` / `*`

- Category: KI (known issue)
- Expected: `FAIL containing "Refinement broke in recent releases"`
- Upstream: Upstream jbig2enc marks the refinement code path broken; the error message tells the caller to file an upstream issue against agl@imperialviolet.org
- Evidence: vendor/jbig2enc/src/jbig2.cc:292 prints `Refinement broke in recent releases`
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2enc, sha: e3fcf0210efa4f644e458a51616d86098d47d8da }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2enc@e3fcf0210efa)
